microsoft_ft: Served as technical bridge between Azure engineering and enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), leading discovery and solution design that scaled recovery validation into a platformized system driving **$14M+ business impact** across 45+ annual drills.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, designing an end-to-end rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and creating a new reference model for continuous validation across security and cloud programs.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as technical strategy lead on a sovereign-cloud network isolation evaluation tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, aligning identity, security, and infrastructure stakeholders to outcomes.

Delivered crisp technical demos and workshops to IAM leaders and C-suite decision-makers, simplifying complex distributed-systems concepts and producing reference architectures and playbooks that upleveled broader GTM and customer-success teams.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows that cut planning cycle time **39%** and increased drill capacity 21% while creating repeatable assets for partner enablement.

Influenced product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, translating field-level pain points into clear problem statements and repeatable solution patterns for Product prioritization.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time **83%** and producing reusable technical collateral that scaled cross-team knowledge sharing.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, running technical discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and architecting a roadmap to automate critical paths to business outcomes.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, equipping leadership with clear evaluation criteria to target automation gaps and prioritize the highest-impact technical support investments at scale.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by designing the legacy OS migration architecture and mapping complex dependencies across 1,200+ stations, aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering on a clear deployment path.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process while building repeatable patterns for execution.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle 25% and producing reusable enablement assets that scaled adoption across teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by optimizing sales operations and owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process that mapped customer needs to clear, repeatable outcomes.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and boosted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to align messaging with high-intent prospect segments.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks and producing crisp data-backed collateral that informed strategic pricing decisions.
